summary: Sandboxed mvn test failed because Mockito Byte Buddy could not self-attach to the JVM. The exact validation passed when rerun with permitted JVM attach behavior.
npm run build failed because TypeScript 6 rejected deprecated node10 module resolution and the frontend lacked Vite declarations for import.meta.env and CSS imports.
Initial Playwright run failed due sandboxed Chromium launch restrictions, incorrect reporter paths, and an ambiguous Completed text selector.
